description: Spec-driven product development pipeline — from ideation to verified code, orchestrated by AI agents

plugins.name: spec-plugin
plugins.description: Spec-driven product development pipeline with 5 agents and 11 skills. Full flow: /ideate → /architect → /plan → /orchestrate (coordinates architect, product-owner, engineer, designer, and QA agents through architecture, stories, implementation, testing, and retrospectives).
